authority: Normative production decisions. Supersedes cycle-1/2 where IDs conflict. Cycles 1–2 files are historical and immutable.

decisions.decision: Primary host TFM is net10.0-windows (.NET 10 LTS through 2028-11-14). Supersedes C2-HOST-LANG's .NET 8 pin. Language remains C#; Rust switch trigger unchanged.
decisions.rationale: Microsoft support policy: .NET 8 EOS 2026-11-10; .NET 10 active LTS. New host must not start on a nearly-EOL LTS.
decisions.implementationConsequence: host/*.csproj TargetFramework=net10.0-windows; install .NET 10 SDK before M0 host smoke
decisions.validationMethod: dotnet build host after SDK install
decisions.reopenTrigger: Measured interop failure unique to net10 with WebView2/touchpad

decisions.decision: Pin Microsoft.Web.WebView2 NuGet 1.0.4078.44 (stable release). Evergreen runtime. Do not use prerelease 1.0.4126.
decisions.rationale: NuGet + MS Learn release notes 2026-07-10 show 1.0.4078.44 as current release SDK.
decisions.reopenTrigger: Security advisory requires newer release SDK

decisions.decision: Node engines ^20.19.0 || >=22.12.0 (recommend 22 LTS); Vite 8.1.4; TypeScript 5.9.3; Three 0.185.1; Rapier deterministic-compat 0.19.3; Vitest 4.1.10; fast-check 4.9.0; optional three-mesh-bvh 0.9.11; glTF Transform 4.4.1.
decisions.rationale: npm re-query 2026-07-10 + disposable smoke: Rapier two-run hash match + Three resolve under Vite package graph. Vite production build exit 0 with three@0.185.1 + rapier-compat@0.19.3 (vite-build-smoke.md).
decisions.implementationConsequence: package.json pins exact; package-lock committed at implement
decisions.reopenTrigger: Registry deprecation or security CVE on pinned version

decisions.decision: Preserve hybrid finger-skate product contract. Vertical slice: push/steer/ollie/nollie/flips/shuvs/catch/land/bail + 50-50. First ship: + boardslide family, hero art, plaza, audio, packaging. Pure browser not dual-foot product.
decisions.rationale: Non-negotiable product charter + cycle-2 boardslide ship scope.
decisions.implementationConsequence: Milestone order G1-first; boardslide in M6 ship path after 50-50
decisions.reopenTrigger: G1 total failure forces product pivot

decisions.decision: Single normative topology: .NET host adapters → ContactFrame JSON → InputHub → FootTracker → GestureFSM → BoardController/ManeuverAssist → Rapier fixed-step → Three interpolate; AgentHarness inject-only; Replay/Telemetry shared pipeline.
decisions.rationale: Cycle-2 architecture validated; cycle-3 freezes interfaces so implementers cannot invent parallel subsystems.
decisions.validationMethod: module contract tests + no forceTrick API
decisions.reopenTrigger: G3 proves JSON transport structurally insufficient

decisions.decision: v0 single dynamic board body + assisted ManeuverSpec; Model B raycast wheels at measured probe after G2 if hull fails rails; no articulated rider first ship. Default 60 Hz; 120 quality benchmark.
decisions.rationale: Cycle-2 comparison + OSS study (Godot_Skate latch idea study-only; GEVP raycast for Model B) still support Model A first.
decisions.implementationConsequence: BoardController impulses one body; grind latch constraint
decisions.reopenTrigger: G2 unfair rails or tip-over failures

decisions.decision: P0 implements both Win11 pointer and Raw Input HID. Production ranking: Raw primary for free dual-plant until pointer accepts. Button 1 report-level; plant-mask foot attribution. Device-mode matrix binding.
decisions.rationale: Unchanged from C2-INPUT-PRIMARY-API; still empirical G1.
decisions.implementationConsequence: M1 dual adapter spike before content
decisions.reopenTrigger: Pointer free dual-plant proven better on target

decisions.decision: Hero board, shoes, modular pro plaza are bespoke. Audio proxies acquired (Kenney UI/Impact, OGA metal-wood + ambience) but not runtime-ready. Rubber004 acquired. Kenney mini-skate blockout only. Freesound grind remains auth-gated candidate. readinessVerdict=asset-gap.
decisions.rationale: Honest quality bar; do not mark boxes with low-quality/unclear assets.
decisions.implementationConsequence: M8 isolated Blender with ownership check; runtime empty until review

decisions.decision: Autonomous build may continue software-verifiable work; must pause at G1 device, G2 human feel, G5 target-machine perf claims, and Blender foreign-process ownership. Never claim G1/G2/G5 from synthetic alone. ContactFrame-only agent. Milestone commits. Failed G1 stops expensive content.
decisions.reopenTrigger: remote device farm proves dual-contact without local human

decisions.decision: Topic-by-topic internet stop for preproduction: host/toolchain closed with primary evidence; input/physics research closed (empirical remain); audio acquired or negative-result recorded; hero mesh search stopped after repeated low-quality/unclear pattern. Implementation-time re-pin is maintenance.
decisions.rationale: Cycle-2 stop was premature on .NET/WebView2/audio; cycle-3 closed those. Remaining uncertainties are gates not web questions.
decisions.implementationConsequence: No further open-web research required before M0 except security recheck
